parameters.query:
with latest as (
  select
    gf.market_id,
    gf.measured_at,
    gf.target_hz,
    gf.actual_hz,
    lag(gf.measured_at) over (partition by gf.market_id order by gf.measured_at) as previous_measured_at
  from energy_data.grid_frequency_measurements gf
  where gf.measured_at >= now() - interval '10 minutes'
), sample as (
  select *
  from latest
  where previous_measured_at is not null
  order by measured_at desc
  limit 1
), previous_state as (
  select coalesce((state ->> 'deviation_seconds')::numeric, 0) as previous_deviation_seconds
  from energy_data.workflow_state
  where workflow_name = 'grid_time_deviation_calculated'
), calculated_row as (
  select
    s.id as source_id,
    sample.market_id,
    sample.measured_at,
    sample.measured_at + make_interval(secs => coalesce(previous_state.previous_deviation_seconds, 0)::double precision) as grid_time,
    (
      coalesce(previous_state.previous_deviation_seconds, 0)
      + ((sample.actual_hz - sample.target_hz) / sample.target_hz)
        * extract(epoch from (sample.measured_at - sample.previous_measured_at))
    )::numeric(12,3) as deviation_seconds
  from sample
  cross join energy_data.data_sources s
  left join previous_state on true
  where s.code = 'calculated'
), upserted as (
  insert into energy_data.grid_time_deviation_measurements (
    source_id,
    market_id,
    measured_at,
    grid_time,
    deviation_seconds,
    source_published_at,
    quality,
    calculation_method
  )
  select
    source_id,
    market_id,
    measured_at,
    grid_time,
    deviation_seconds,
    measured_at,
    'calculated',
    'frequency_integral_approximation'
  from calculated_row
  on conflict (source_id, market_id, measured_at) do update
  set
    grid_time = excluded.grid_time,
    deviation_seconds = excluded.deviation_seconds,
    source_published_at = excluded.source_published_at,
    quality = excluded.quality,
    calculation_method = excluded.calculation_method,
    ingested_at = now()
  returning source_id, measured_at, deviation_seconds
), state_upsert as (
  insert into energy_data.workflow_state (
    workflow_name,
    source_id,
    last_success_at,
    last_source_timestamp,
    state
  )
  select
    'grid_time_deviation_calculated',
    source_id,
    now(),
    measured_at,
    jsonb_build_object('deviation_seconds', deviation_seconds)
  from upserted
  on conflict (workflow_name) do update
  set
    source_id = excluded.source_id,
    last_success_at = excluded.last_success_at,
    last_source_timestamp = excluded.last_source_timestamp,
    state = excluded.state,
    updated_at = now()
  returning 1
)
insert into energy_data.ingestion_runs (
  workflow_name,
  source_id,
  finished_at,
  status,
  records_read,
  records_written
)
select
  'grid_time_deviation_calculated',
  coalesce((select source_id from upserted limit 1), (select id from energy_data.data_sources where code = 'calculated')),
  now(),
  case when exists (select 1 from upserted) then 'success' else 'partial' end,
  (select count(*)::integer from sample),
  (select count(*)::integer from upserted);
